expo.name: The Academy - Youth Sports
expo.description: Youth athletic training in Gallatin, TN. Basketball, SAQ, multi-sport development. Schedule sessions, track progress, chat with coaches.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The Academy needs access to your camera to take photos and videos for chat messages, such as sharing training highlights, and to update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The Academy needs access to your photo library so you can share photos and videos in chat messages, such as sharing training highlights, and update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: The Academy adds your upcoming training sessions to your calendar with reminder alerts so you never miss a workout.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The Academy needs access to your microphone to record audio when capturing video for chat messages.

plugins.photosPermission: The Academy needs access to your photo library so you can share photos and videos in chat messages and update your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: The Academy needs access to your camera to take photos and videos for chat messages, such as sharing training highlights, and to update your profile picture.
plugins.microphonePermission: The Academy needs access to your microphone to record audio when capturing video for chat messages.

plugins.calendarPermission: The Academy adds your upcoming training sessions to your calendar with reminder alerts so you never miss a workout.
